languages.text: "Значит, и вы тоже!..." {n}Реакция у Изимонда отменная — ваши выстрелы звучат практически одновременно. Плазма прожигает страшную рану в вашем боку, а в груди капитана возникает кровавая дыра. Он оседает на землю, до последнего сверля вас ненавидящим взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: [ldraft] Изимонд, конечно, в итоге смертельно ранен, но и мы тоже. Либо мы его убиваем, но на заварушку прибегает стража и мы уже не увидим, чем кончилось дело.

languages.text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Значит, и вы тоже!..." {n}Реакция у Изимонда отменная — ваши выстрелы звучат практически одновременно. Плазма прожигает страшную рану в вашем боку, а в груди капитана возникает кровавая дыра. Он оседает на землю, до последнего сверля вас ненавидящим взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

"What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

"What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

languages.text: «¡¿Usted también?!». {n}La reacción de Sauerback es excelente: vuestros disparos resuenan casi al mismo tiempo. El plasma abre una terrible herida en tu costado y un agujero sangriento aparece en el pecho del capitán. Cae al suelo, concentrando todo el odio que es capaz de reunir en su mirada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡¿Usted también?!». {n}La reacción de Sauerback es excelente: vuestros disparos resuenan casi al mismo tiempo. El plasma abre una terrible herida en tu costado y un agujero sangriento aparece en el pecho del capitán. Cae al suelo, concentrando todo el odio que es capaz de reunir en su mirada.{/n}

languages.text: “什么，你竟然也！”{n}苏尔贝克反应极快，你们二人的枪响声几乎重叠。等离子在你腰间烧出一个可怕的伤口，而上尉的胸口则开了一个血洞。他颓然倒地，倾尽全身的忿恨怒视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “什么，你竟然也！”{n}苏尔贝克反应极快，你们二人的枪响声几乎重叠。等离子在你腰间烧出一个可怕的伤口，而上尉的胸口则开了一个血洞。他颓然倒地，倾尽全身的忿恨怒视着你。{/n}

languages.text: « Quoi, vous aussi ? » {n}Sauerback fait preuve d'excellents réflexes, et vos tirs respectifs détonent presque simultanément. Le plasma brûlant laisse une plaie béante dans votre flanc, et un trou sanguinolent apparaît sur la poitrine du capitaine. Il s'effondre comme une poupée de chiffon, sans cesser de river sur vous un regard dégoulinant de haine.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Quoi, vous aussi ? » {n}Sauerback fait preuve d'excellents réflexes, et vos tirs respectifs détonent presque simultanément. Le plasma brûlant laisse une plaie béante dans votre flanc, et un trou sanguinolent apparaît sur la poitrine du capitaine. Il s'effondre comme une poupée de chiffon, sans cesser de river sur vous un regard dégoulinant de haine.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne, sen de mi?" {n}Sauerback'in tepki süresi mükemmel. Atışlarınızın sesi neredeyse aynı anda çıkıyor. Plazma böğründe korkunç bir yara açarken yüzbaşının göğsünde kanlı bir delik beliriyor. Toplayabildiği tüm nefretle sana dik dik bakarak yere yığılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ne, sen de mi?" {n}Sauerback'in tepki süresi mükemmel. Atışlarınızın sesi neredeyse aynı anda çıkıyor. Plazma böğründe korkunç bir yara açarken yüzbaşının göğsünde kanlı bir delik beliriyor. Toplayabildiği tüm nefretle sana dik dik bakarak yere yığılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was, Ihr auch!" {n}Sauerback reagiert blitzschnell ... eure Schüsse ertönen fast gleichzeitig. Das Plasma brennt eine hässliche Wunde in deine Seite, während auf der Brust des Captains ein blutiges Loch erscheint. Er bricht zusammen und wirft dir einen hasserfüllten Blick zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was, Ihr auch!" {n}Sauerback reagiert blitzschnell ... eure Schüsse ertönen fast gleichzeitig. Das Plasma brennt eine hässliche Wunde in deine Seite, während auf der Brust des Captains ein blutiges Loch erscheint. Er bricht zusammen und wirft dir einen hasserfüllten Blick zu.{/n}

languages.text: 「なんだ、お前もか！」{n}サウアーバックの反応速度は抜群だ。お前が撃った音とほぼ同時に、プラズマが腹を抉り、船長の胸に血の穴が開いた。彼は恨み節を吐きながら倒れ込んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「なんだ、お前もか！」{n}サウアーバックの反応速度は抜群だ。お前が撃った音とほぼ同時に、プラズマが腹を抉り、船長の胸に血の穴が開いた。彼は恨み節を吐きながら倒れ込んだ。{/n}
